What are the main themes in the uploaded documents? 📚

Based on your uploaded sources, I identified three main themes:

  1. Climate adaptation — both sources discuss regional strategies for resilience
  2. Policy frameworks — legislative approaches and international agreements
  3. Economic impact — cost-benefit analyses of mitigation vs. adaptation

These themes appear consistently across all three uploaded PDFs.

Can you summarize the policy recommendations from source 2?

Source 2 recommends a three-pronged policy approach:

  • Carbon pricing at $85 per tonne by 2030
  • Mandatory corporate disclosure of climate risk
  • Green infrastructure investment of 2% of GDP annually
Recommended timeline:
  2025-2027: Pilot carbon pricing schemes
  2028-2030: National rollout at $85/tonne
  2031+:     International harmonisation

The authors note that without coordinated international action, domestic measures alone achieve only 40% of required reductions.
